name: Golden Greaves
description:
These shiny greaves made of splinted metal coated with gold protect the shins and help you stand your ground in the heat of battle. While wearing the greaves, you gain a +1 item bonus to your Fortitude DC against forced movement effects and to your Reflex DC against effects that would knock you .

Activate—Make Them Fall r (concentrate, misfortune)

Frequency once per day

Trigger An enemy fails to , , or you

Effect Your golden greaves glow with a strange light, and you move your legs in just the right way to completely throw off your opponent. Your opponent instead critically fails on the triggering check.
